overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a serene alien hot spring environment. The camera slowly orbits around two blue Na'vi characters relaxing in a geothermal pool, revealing waterfalls, floating mountains, and vibrant alien flora.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien hot spring pool enclosed by rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the hot spring pool to survey the alien landscape

notable_agents.action: two blue Na'vi characters sitting and relaxing in the hot spring pool

entered.detail: layered rock formations surrounding the pool with prayer flags strung across
colorful fabric banners hanging between rock formations
clear turquoise geothermal pool with steam rising from the surface
two blue humanoid figures sitting at the pool's edge with their feet in the water

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a serene alien hot spring nestled within rocky cliffs. Two blue Na'vi characters relax in the turquoise water while colorful prayer flags hang overhead. Steam rises gently from the pool as the camera begins a slow leftward pan.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront area with waterfalls and alien encampment

events.description: camera pans left to reveal large twin waterfalls and wider water body beyond the pool

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left, revealing the expansive waterfall and alien camp structures on the shore

notable_agents.action: two Na'vi characters still visible relaxing in the pool, now viewed from the side

entered.detail: large twin waterfalls cascading down rocky cliffs into the lake below
large red alien canopy structures resembling tents on the left shore
trees with distinctive red foliage along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the enclosed pool opens up to reveal a magnificent waterfront scene. Twin waterfalls crash down in the background while red alien tent structures line the shore. The Na'vi characters remain visible on the right as the view expands to show the wider lake and alien vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien valley with floating mountains and red flora

events.description: floating mountains become visible in the distance as the camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: panning further left to reveal the distant floating mountains and expansive valley

entered.detail: rocky mesas and islands floating in the sky with structures atop them
distant cliff faces covered in red and purple alien vegetation

segments.scene_description: The pan continues to showcase the vastness of the alien valley. Floating mountains hover in the distance above cliffs covered in vibrant red flora. The red tent structures move toward the center of the frame while the Na'vi characters become smaller in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal vents area with rocky outcrops

events.description: geysers and steam vents become prominent on the left side as camera completes the pan

agents.ego_description: completing the leftward pan to show the geothermal steam vents and left cliff face with prayer flags

entered.detail: steam rising from geothermal vents in the rocky terrain on the left
tall rock spires and tower-like formations on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit by revealing the left side of the valley, where active geysers vent steam into the air. Prayer flags reappear on the left cliff face, and tall rock spires rise in the distance. The floating mountains shift to the right side of the frame as the panoramic view concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera orbit that begins in an intimate geothermal pool and expands into a panoramic vista of a vast alien valley. It begins with a slow leftward pan across two Na'vi characters relaxing in turquoise waters beneath colorful prayer flags and rising steam. As the camera moves, the enclosed rocky cliffs open up to reveal a magnificent waterfront featuring twin crashing waterfalls and red alien tent structures lining the shore. The view then expands further to showcase floating mountains hovering above cliffs of vibrant red flora, shifting the focus from the characters toward the scale of the surrounding landscape. Finally, the orbit concludes by revealing active geysers venting steam and tall rock spires on the far side of the valley, with prayer flags reappearing on the opposite cliff face.
